disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest pressure/tightness present during the episode
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me about the pressure in your chest?
Where exactly do you feel it and what does it feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a tight pressure across my chest — it feels heavy and it's there along with my heart pounding.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Near-syncope / feeling faint reliably brought on within seconds of standing
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you stand up?
Have you felt faint or like you might black out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Every time I stand I go really dizzy and feel like I'm about to black out, so I have to sit straight back down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sustained fast, pounding heartbeat that is not settling with rest
trigger_question_examples: How fast does your heart feel?
Does it settle when you rest?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's racing and pounding and it just won't slow down, even when I lie still.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Shortness of breath and rapid breathing accompanying the episode
trigger_question_examples: Are you having any trouble breathing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm short of breath and breathing really fast — I can't seem to slow it down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Facial and neck flushing with sweating in a cool environment
trigger_question_examples: Are you noticing any flushing or sweating?
What does your skin feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My face and neck are burning red and I'm sweating even though the room is cool.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms began immediately after a hostile social encounter the patient experienced as discriminatory; a recurring pattern with stressful encounters
trigger_question_examples: Was there anything happening just before this started?
Have you had episodes like this before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It kicked off right after a confrontation tonight where I felt singled out and discriminated against. I do get racing-heart episodes around situations like that, but never this bad.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No prescribed cardiac or autonomic medications; not currently taking anything regularly
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medications?
Any heart or blood pressure medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not on any regular medications — nothing for my heart or blood pressure.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone; no one present tonight to assist if a faint/fall occurs
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you right now?
Who could help you if you felt faint?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm on my own here tonight — there's nobody with me.
